# RAVENCI Solutions

> Premium web development and digital design agency in Brisbane, Australia.

RAVENCI Solutions is a founder-led digital agency based in Brisbane, Queensland, Australia. Founded by Richard Haddad, the studio has 25+ years of experience building high-performance websites, web applications, mobile apps, and brand identity systems for Australian businesses.

## Services

- Custom Web Development (Next.js, WordPress) from $4,950
- Web Application Development
- Mobile App Development (iOS, Android)
- Business Design (branding, logo, identity systems)
- SEO & Content Services
- Managed Cloud Hosting from $39/mo
- Website Maintenance from $249/mo
- Monthly Retainer Packages from $275/mo

## Industry Specialisations

- Healthcare (AHPRA-compliant, Cliniko/HotDoc integration)
- Construction (QBCC licence display, project portfolios)

## Key Facts

- Location: Brisbane, Queensland, Australia
- Founded by: Richard Haddad
- Website: https://ravenci.solutions
- Experience: 25+ years in digital development
- Guarantee: 85+ Google PageSpeed score
- Pricing: Transparent AUD pricing, no hidden fees

## Content

- Articles and guides on web development, SEO, and business strategy
- Case studies showcasing real client results
- Brisbane Website Audit (50 local businesses audited)
- Comparison guides: Custom vs Template, WordPress vs Shopify vs Custom
- Cost breakdowns for website development in Brisbane
